contactPage.title: Contact AmusementPark
contactPage.lead: Send a note about the site, a missing detail, a data issue or an idea to improve the experience.

email.title: Direct contact
email.note: You can write directly to this address; it is the stable contact for the site.

form.title: Leave a message
form.description: Leave a note, correction or improvement idea.
form.help: Write your message simply, without unnecessary links.
form.validation: Enter a clear message between 10 and 2000 characters.
form.error: The message could not be sent. Check the text or try again later.

privacy.title: A protected space
privacy.text: The form stays intentionally simple so exchanges remain clean and useful.

points.plainText: Your message should stay clear and respectful.
points.admin: Only the site team can read messages.
